nasb.text: I took my staff Favor and cut it in pieces, to break my covenant which I had made with all the peoples.

esv.text: And I took my staff Favor, and I broke it, annulling the covenant that I had made with all the peoples.

cnv.text: 然後，我拿起我那根稱為“恩寵”的杖，把它折斷，表示要廢除我與萬民所立的約；

ccb.text: 然后，我拿起那根叫“恩惠”的杖，把它折断，以废除我与万民所立的约。
